message:
refactor(codegen): Migrate final 1-block files (array, gzip) to withInlineBlock

Completed migration of last 2 complex 1-block files:
- array_mod.zig (genArray) - handles typecode-based array construction
- gzip_mod.zig (genOpen) - handles file path and mode parameters

59 blocks now migrated. All 1-block files complete.
Next: 2-block files migration.
